tooltip.composite_material.allay_steel_i: 予悅靈以地牢鋼錠，遂變為此物也。
tooltip.composite_material.obsidian_stee: 精鍛之材，製物乃得此物。
tooltip.composite_material.echoium_ingot: 精鍛之材，製物乃得此物。
tooltip.composite_material.etherite_ingo: 此乃天界仙品之材，極良於玄鈺錠者也，製物乃得此物。
tooltip.composite_material.dungeon_steel: 置黑曜石鋼錠于孽衍笼， %s%s之機可成也。
tooltip.composite_material.abyss_fang: Converted by Elder Guardian Spike which putted near by an activated Conduit.
tooltip.composite_material.heart_of_the_: Can be converted to Heart Of The Sea when this item is near by an activated Conduit.
tooltip.composite_material.strong_will: 以琉璃瓶取自然滋生之幽匿嘯乃得此物。
tooltip.composite_material.primitive_ten: 上古精鍛之材，製物乃得此物。
tooltip.composite_material.primitive_nos:
Set the duration to infinity for all effects which greater than 3 minutes.
Double the duration for all effects which less than 3 minutes.
message.composite_material.lacerator: Time: %fs Extra Damage: %f Arrow Base Damage: %.2f
message.composite_material.scapegoat: 一銳箭疾射向標，然標之怒火，將盡泄於%s身。
tooltip.composite_material.disenchanted_: 主手持此物，副手持淬靈之器，右擊而用之， right click to use it to transfer all the enchantments to Enchanted書.
tooltip.composite_material.duplichanted_: 主手持此物，副手持淬靈之書，右擊而用之， right click to use it to duplicate the enchanted book.
tooltip.composite_material.enlightened_b: 主手持此物，副手持器，右擊而用之，, right click to use it to enchant item based on your XP level (cost 3 XP level, able to enchant treasure enchantments).
tooltip.composite_material.purifichanted:
主手持此物，副手持淬靈之物，右擊而用之， right click to clear all curse enchantments of the enchanted item.
It can also clear all curse enchantments of armors you equipping.
tooltip.composite_material.sepachanted_b: 主手持此物，副手持淬靈之物，右擊而用之， right click to separate the first enchantment of the enchanted item.
tooltip.composite_material.reinforced_bo: 主手持此物，副手持淬靈之物，右擊而用之，則淬靈之物上凡其淬靈之品階逾一者，皆升其階也（至多於其最大品階增%s階）。
tooltip.composite_material.creative_rein: 主手持此物，副手持淬靈之物，右擊而用之，則淬靈之物上凡其淬靈之品階逾一者，皆升其階也（無品階之限也）。
tooltip.composite_material.ancient_book:
Right click to absorb all enchantments of the offhand item when the book is not enchanted.
Right click again to release all enchantments to the offhand item and consume durability when the book is enchanted.
Same Enchantments will take the highest, .
tooltip.composite_material.ancient_book_: "It could not bear the burden of the magic. It needs to release them immediately......"
tooltip.composite_material.forbidden_boo:
Hold this item in main hand and hold the tool in off hand, right click to use it to remove all the enchantments and add Vanitas effect to your tool.
Vanitas effect allows you deal extra damage based on target's max Health when you don't have any potion effects and enchantments.
tooltip.composite_material.etherite_tote: Hold this item in main hand and hold the damageable item in off hand, right click to tag the offhand item Unbreakable.
Hold this item in offhand to use it like a Totem Of Undying, it won't be costed but has cool down. Equip full sets of 皓炁 armors will reduce the cool down.
tooltip.composite_material.dungeon_steel: Hold this item in main hand and hold the damageable item in off hand, right click to duplicate offhand item, but you'll suffer the lethal damage.
If you left click an entity which it's current health is lower than %s%s of your current health, it will convert to a spawn egg.
tooltip.composite_material.etherite_nugg:
主手持此物，副手持易損之器，右擊而用之，則使物復全耐久也。
If off hand item is in cooldown, right click to finish the cooldown.
tooltip.composite_material.echoium_nugge: 主手持此物，副手持易損之器，右擊而用之，則使物除修繕之罰也。
tooltip.composite_material.allay_steel_n: 主手持此物，副手持淬靈之器，右擊而用之，則淬靈之器上諸般淬靈盡除矣。
tooltip.composite_material.dungeon_steel: 主手持此物，副手持淬靈之器，右擊而用之，則淬靈之器上凡其淬靈之品階逾一者，皆降其階也。
tooltip.composite_material.obsidian_stee: 主手持此物，副手持易損之器，右擊而用之，則使物復%s耐久也。
tooltip.composite_material.abyss_blade: Getting specific aquatic items when killing aquatic mobs.
tooltip.composite_material.allay_steel_a: You'll immune Fall Damage, Hunger, Poison and Wither.
You will regenerate yourself as 悅靈 when you equipped full set.
tooltip.composite_material.allay_steel_t: Deal damage to all the same targets in the area.
Dig all the same blocks in the area (Maximum 64).
tooltip.composite_material.copper_tool: Rusting when the item is dropped in water.
tooltip.composite_material.rusted_copper: Greatly reduces attributes, but attacks cause poisoning.
tooltip.composite_material.echoium_armor: 一夫當關，免受烈焰，盲，黯，虚之灾。
著其全裝，則監守不生於吾側也。
tooltip.composite_material.echoium_tool: 依彼身甲胄之禦，致額外之傷，無視其甲胄之禦也。
tooltip.composite_material.etherite_tool: 金剛不壞，依彼身失之氣血，致額外之傷也
tooltip.composite_material.etherite_armo: 金剛不壞，一夫當關，增益余屬，著其一物，即可令豕靈對汝持中立之態。
免受墜地、烈焰、嚴寒、窒息、尖刺之傷，及諸般不祥之灾。
著其全裝，速復氣血，翺翔九天。
tooltip.composite_material.obsidian_armo: 兼金剛之堅與金之貴者也，著其一物，即可令豕靈對汝持中立之態。
tooltip.composite_material.primitive_too: 依己身當下氣血，致額外之傷也。
"其不堪魔咒之重荷，已無法復加矣......"
Get enormous repair cost when enchanted.
tooltip.composite_material.primitive_arm: Each 荒古 armor will reduce the amount of mobs direct damage you take, immune Slowness, Nausea, Mining Fatigue, Airless and Thorns.
Can only provide tiny Armor value and get enormous repair cost when enchanted.
tooltip.composite_material.amethyst_tool: Mending slowly when the item is dropped in water.
tooltip.composite_material.dungeon_shiel: Enemies' healing in a wide area will effect on you.
tooltip.composite_material.etherite_shie: Unbreakable, never cooling, immune ranged attack when holding with full 皓炁 set.
tooltip.composite_material.amethyst_armo: Each amethyst armor will reduce the amount of magic damage you take.
tooltip.composite_material.disc_axe_cove: A sharp blade which can chop down warden's hand, to break the silence by it's whisper in ancient city.
tooltip.composite_material.disc_axe: Deal multiple damage when the target is Warden.
tooltip.composite_material.disc_axe_2: Getting specific sculk items when killing Wardens, Silk Touch enchantment will lock the item to Echo Shard.
tooltip.composite_material.disc_sword: Has probability of getting specific golden items when killing mobs, Looting enchantment will increase the chance.
tooltip.composite_material.disc_sword_sp:
PiglinBrute = Netherite Scrap
Piglin = Golden Apple
WanderingTrader = Enchanted Golden Apple
Villager = Bell
Illager = Totem Of Undying
Other = Gold錠
tooltip.composite_material.disc_pickaxe: Has probability of getting ores when digging stone blocks (EXCEPT ANCIENT DEBRIS), Fortune enchantment will increase the chance.
tooltip.composite_material.disc_mace: Has probability of getting beacon payments when digging beacon base blocks, Fortune enchantment will increase the chance.
tooltip.composite_material.disc_mace_1: The storage blocks will disappear after breaking.
tooltip.composite_material.disc_mace_2: Add the number of loots based on your Falling Distance when you killing mobs.
tooltip.composite_material.disc_shovel: Has probability of getting crops and seeds when digging grass blocks, and extreme low probability of getting sniffer egg, Fortune enchantment will increase the chance (Higher level will drop more times).
tooltip.composite_material.disc_hoe: Has probability of getting crops and seeds when ploughing, and extreme low probability of getting sniffer egg, Fortune enchantment will increase the chance (Higher level will drop more times).
tooltip.composite_material.dungeon_sword: Heal yourself when you attack the target, healing amount is based on your damage.
Has probability of getting spawn eggs when killing mobs, Looting enchantment will increase the chance.
tooltip.composite_material.dungeon_hamme: Deal extra damage based on your Falling Distance, and clear your Falling Distance at the same time.
tooltip.composite_material.dungeon_picka: Heal yourself when you're attacked, healing amount is constant.
Able to drop empty Spawner when breaking Spawner.
tooltip.composite_material.dungeon_axe: Heal yourself when you kill the target, healing amount is based on target's max health.
tooltip.composite_material.dungeon_axe_1: Has probability of getting head when killing mobs, Fortune enchantment will increase the chance.
tooltip.composite_material.lacerator: The arrow damage depend on your drawing duration, longer duration will increase the speed of damage accumulation.
tooltip.composite_material.lacerator_1: The damage will be multiplied by Strength enchantment level.
tooltip.composite_material.scapegoat: Get the target through melee attack, if the target is valid, the arrow will shoot in the target's name.
tooltip.composite_material.sonic_boom_wa: Shoot a penetrating sonic boom forward that deals magic damage after charge.
tooltip.composite_material.sculk_infuser: 可復以神魂灌註於方塊之上之幽匿嘯也。.
tooltip.composite_material.shift_cover: Pressing SHIFT to get more information.
